About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: The flame that unites CIn
About.body: Born from the desire to unite the students of UFPE's Informatics Center through sports, Atlética Incinera is more than an association — it's a family. Since our founding, we've carried the mission of representing CIn in university competitions with grit, passion, and team spirit. Every game, every practice, every achievement strengthens us as a community.

recruitment.title: Want to be part?
recruitment.description: Applications for the new board are open until {deadline}. This is your chance to make history at CIn.

Teams.subtitle: CIn's strength on every court
Teams.metaDescription: Meet the sports teams of Atlética Incinera — representing CIn UFPE in futsal, volleyball, basketball, handball, and more.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: Got a question, suggestion, or want to join? Let's burn!

cta.heading: Want to be part of this story?
cta.body: Connect your brand with the best tech talent in Northeast Brazil

s1.description: Sponsor 1 is a fundamental partner company that believes in sports and technology as vectors of change in education and the academic community.

s2.description: A reference in the tech market, providing ongoing support for the Athletic Association's initiatives and events.

s3.description: Investing in the potential of computer science students to transform them into the great leaders of the future.

p1.description: Supports our events and competitions by providing infrastructure and support.

p2.description: A long-time partner, ensuring the integration of the entire academic community.

p3.description: Encouraging university sports with technical and financial support.

meta.title: Become a Sponsor
meta.description: Connect your brand to Northeast Brazil's tech elite. Support Atlética Incinera and gain visibility in Pernambuco's largest university IT ecosystem.

hero.subtitle: Support the largest tech athletic association in the region and be present where innovation happens. Real visibility, real talent.

pillars.title: Why invest in Incinera?
pillars.subtitle: Four concrete reasons for your brand to be with us throughout the entire academic year.

talent.title: Top Tech Talent
talent.desc: We are the athletic association of the best Computer Science center in the Northeast and one of the top 5 in Brazil (RUF/MEC). Our students are in the 3 programs with the highest UFPE entrance scores. Sponsoring us means direct access to the most sought-after tech talents on the market.

regional.title: Dominant Tech Force
regional.desc: We represent the largest sports and social tech community in Pernambuco. We engage hundreds of developers, engineers and designers daily and are a reference for other institutions in the region.

reach.title: Guaranteed Visibility
reach.desc: Our community is highly engaged. During our events, we reach over 30,000 Instagram impressions. Your brand doesn't just appear on uniforms—it lives in the feed of thousands of tech-savvy youth.

presence.title: 365-Day Exposure
presence.desc: Unlike one-off sponsorships, our partner is with us all year long. From freshman orientation to national competitions (INTERENG, JUPS, and others), your brand gets guaranteed exposure across the academic calendar.

activations.title: Where your brand will be
activations.subtitle: Activation formats included in our strategic partnership.
activations.banners: Banners and materials at our events
activations.instagram: Sponsored posts and stories on Instagram
activations.competitions: Presence at state and national competitions
activations.website: Featured on the official Incinera website

audience.title: Connect with the professionals of tomorrow
audience.body: Our members are recruited by the top companies at Porto Digital and across Brazil. Be present where talent is shaped before it even enters the job market.
audience.portDigitalLink: Learn more about the Porto Digital ecosystem

gallery.quote: Our partners are part of every victory, every practice, and every achievement of Incinera.

form.badge: I want to be a partner
form.title: Ready to be part of it?
form.subtitle: Fill out the form and our marketing team will reach out with our complete sponsorship portfolio.

nomeFantasia.label: How is your company known in the market?

visaoParceria.label: How do you envision this partnership?
visaoParceria.placeholder: We want to connect our brand with developers in training and participate in the main tech events at UFPE...
visaoParceria.hint: Minimum 20 characters. Be specific about your visibility, recruitment, or activation goals.

form.privacy: Your data is used solely for partnership contact purposes. No information is shared with third parties.

success.title: Proposal received! 🔥
success.description: Our marketing team will reach out soon with the sponsorship portfolio.
